text:
(a) In a hearing under Section 547.206 (Compliance Proceeding Hearing) or in the absence of a request for a hearing, the department may make a determination of the following issues only:

(1) whether an item of vehicle equipment has been offered, distributed, or sold in violation of a department standard;

(2) whether the manufacturer did not submit test data required by the department under Section 547.203 (Vehicle Equipment Testing: Department Standards) ; and

(3) whether an item of vehicle equipment has been offered, distributed, or sold without the identification required by Section 547.201 (Offenses Relating to the Offer, Distribution, and Sale of Vehicle Equipment) .

(b) The department by order shall prohibit the manufacture, offer for sale, distribution for sale, or sale of the item if the department finds affirmatively on at least one of the issues.

(c) After entering its order, the department shall send written notice by certified mail, return receipt requested, to each person the department notified under Section 547.205 (Initiation of Compliance Proceeding) .
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 547. Vehicle Equip.
##### § 547.207 — Compliance Proceeding Issues

(a) In a hearing under Section 547.206 (Compliance Proceeding Hearing) or in the absence of a request for a hearing, the department may make a determination of the following issues only:

    (1) whether an item of vehicle equipment has been offered, distributed, or sold in violation of a department standard;

    (2) whether the manufacturer did not submit test data required by the department under Section 547.203 (Vehicle Equipment Testing: Department Standards) ; and

    (3) whether an item of vehicle equipment has been offered, distributed, or sold without the identification required by Section 547.201 (Offenses Relating to the Offer, Distribution, and Sale of Vehicle Equipment) .

(b) The department by order shall prohibit the manufacture, offer for sale, distribution for sale, or sale of the item if the department finds affirmatively on at least one of the issues.

(c) After entering its order, the department shall send written notice by certified mail, return receipt requested, to each person the department notified under Section 547.205 (Initiation of Compliance Proceeding) .

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: In a hearing under Section 547.206 (Compliance Proceeding Hearing) or in the absence of a request for a hearing, the department may make a determination of the following issues only:
whether an item of vehicle equipment has been offered, distributed, or sold in violation of a department standard;
whether the manufacturer did not submit test data required by the department under Section 547.203 (Vehicle Equipment Testing: Department Standards) ; and

whether an item of vehicle equipment has been offered, distributed, or sold without the identification required by Section 547.201 (Offenses Relating to the Offer, Distribution, and Sale of Vehicle Equipment) .

subsections.label: c
subsections.text: After entering its order, the department shall send written notice by certified mail, return receipt requested, to each person the department notified under Section 547.205 (Initiation of Compliance Proceeding) .
